allow: Bash(python3 -c "import re; content = open\('page.html'\).read\(\); buttons = re.findall\(r'<button[^>]{0,500}?>\(.*?\)</button>', content, re.IGNORECASE\); [print\(b[:100]\) for b in buttons[:20]]")

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Projects\\CourseTaker\\page.html" -Raw; $idx = $content.IndexOf\('knowledge-check-modal'\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { Write-Host "Found at position $idx`nContext:"; $content.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0, $idx-300\), [Math]::Min\(600, $content.Length - $idx + 300\)\) } else { Write-Host "Not found" })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Projects\\CourseTaker\\page.html" -Raw; if \($content.Contains\('sc-empnci'\)\) { Write-Host "Found sc-empnci" } else { Write-Host "sc-empnci NOT found" }; if \($content.Contains\('kEpKFH'\)\) { Write-Host "Found kEpKFH" } else { Write-Host "kEpKFH NOT found" }; if \($content.Contains\('>Next<'\)\) { Write-Host "Found >Next< button text" } else { Write-Host ">Next< NOT found" })
